outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH VOLATILITY: Combined negative GEX (-9.6B) creates dealer short gamma positioning. Spot at critical structural level - expect amplified moves in either direction with volatility expansion.

Extreme monthly PCR (3.71) indicates potential inflection point. 0DTE reverse smirk conflicts with bearish weekly/monthly skew - expect resolution move.

Major structural put OI in WEEKLY (10.2K) and MONTHLY (109K). Secondary support if 640 RESONANCE breaks - negative gamma acceleration target.
